C

CharacterDatabaseService - Class in com.gcu.business
CharacterDatabaseService is a Spring service class that provides business logic for managing character entities in the application.
CharacterDatabaseService(CharacterRepository, RaceRepository, ClassRepository) - Constructor for class com.gcu.business.CharacterDatabaseService
Constructor for CharacterDatabaseService, which initializes the repositories used for character management.
CharacterEntity - Class in com.gcu.models
CharacterEntity represents a character created by a user in the application.
CharacterEntity() - Constructor for class com.gcu.models.CharacterEntity
Default constructor for CharacterEntity.
CharacterRepository - Interface in com.gcu.data
CharacterRepository is a Spring Data JPA repository interface for managing CharacterEntity objects.
characters(String, String, String, Model, HttpSession) - Method in class com.gcu.controllers.CharactersController
Handles GET requests to "/characters" endpoint, allowing users to view a list of characters with optional search and sorting parameters.
CharactersController - Class in com.gcu.controllers
Controller for handling character-related operations such as listing, viewing, creating, editing, and deleting characters.
CharactersController(CharacterDatabaseService, RaceDatabaseService, ClassDatabaseService) - Constructor for class com.gcu.controllers.CharactersController
Constructor for CharactersController, using dependency injection to receive service instances.
ClassDatabaseService - Class in com.gcu.business
Service class for handling business logic related to ClassEntity.
ClassDatabaseService(ClassRepository) - Constructor for class com.gcu.business.ClassDatabaseService
Constructor for ClassDatabaseService.
ClassEntity - Class in com.gcu.models
ClassEntity represents a character class in the application.
ClassEntity() - Constructor for class com.gcu.models.ClassEntity
Default constructor for ClassEntity, required by JPA.
ClassRepository - Interface in com.gcu.data
ClassRepository is an interface that extends JpaRepository to provide CRUD operations for ClassEntity objects.
CloudAppApplication - Class in com.gcu
CloudAppApplication is the main entry point for the Spring Boot application.
CloudAppApplication() - Constructor for class com.gcu.CloudAppApplication
 
com.gcu - package com.gcu
 
com.gcu.business - package com.gcu.business
 
com.gcu.controllers - package com.gcu.controllers
 
com.gcu.data - package com.gcu.data
 
com.gcu.models - package com.gcu.models
 
createCharacter(CharacterEntity, HttpSession) - Method in class com.gcu.controllers.CharactersController
Handles POST requests to "/characters/create" endpoint, allowing users to submit the form for creating a new character.
